sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root רִיב).-

(1) strife, contention, Gen 13:8 Exo 17:7 Num 27:14.

(2) [Meribah], pr.n.-(a) of a fountain flowing from a rock in the desert of Sin on the Heroopolitan gulf, -Exod. 17:17 .-(b) מֵי מְרִיבָה (“water of strife”), another similar fountain in the desert of Zin, near Kadesh, Num 20:13, 24 Num 20:24 Deu 33:8 Psa 81:8 106:32 fully מֵי מְרִיבֹות קָדֵשׁ Eze 47:19.
